footer.tagline: Free mortgage simulators for individuals and French real estate investors.
footer.disclaimer: The information provided is for guidance only and does not constitute financial advice. Consult a professional for your project.

home.metaDescription: Calculate your monthly payments, borrowing capacity and notary fees in 30 seconds. 100% free mortgage simulators, no sign-up required.
home.heroDesc1: Calculate your monthly payments, borrowing capacity and notary fees in
home.toolsSubtitle: All our simulators are regularly updated with 2026 data.
home.ratesSubtitle: Built-in indicative reference — no API calls

tools.loanSimulatorDesc: Calculate your monthly payments, total cost and amortization schedule in real time.
tools.borrowingCapacityDesc: Find out the maximum amount banks can lend you based on your situation.
tools.notaryFeesDesc: Estimate notary fees for your real estate purchase (old or new property).
tools.earlyRepaymentDesc: Calculate the savings from repaying part of your loan ahead of schedule.
tools.fixedVsVariableDesc: Compare both rate types over the full loan term under different scenarios.
tools.ratesByCityDesc: View average rates in major French cities.

simulateurPret.pageDesc: Instantly calculate your monthly payments, total interest cost and amortization schedule. Adjust parameters in real time to compare different financing scenarios.

capaciteEmprunt.pageDesc: Find out how much you can borrow based on your income, expenses and personal contribution. Our tool instantly calculates your maximum monthly payment, borrowable capital and debt ratio according to HCSF 2026 rules.
capaciteEmprunt.whatIfMoreHint: Add hypothetical income to see the impact on your capacity
capaciteEmprunt.highDebtDesc: Your debt ratio exceeds the HCSF threshold of 35%. Banks may reject your application. Reduce your expenses or increase your contribution.

fraisNotaire.pageDesc: Precisely estimate notary fees for your real estate purchase, whether for old or new property. Our calculator uses the official 2024 schedule with a detailed breakdown of each expense.
fraisNotaire.newDiscount: ✓ Reduced rate for new properties (0.715% instead of 5.806%)

remboursementAnticipe.pageDesc: Calculate the savings from repaying part of your mortgage ahead of schedule. The tool calculates legal early repayment fees (IRA), net gain and helps you choose between duration or monthly payment reduction.
remboursementAnticipe.iraLegal: The legal IRA is capped at the minimum of: 3% of the repaid capital, or 6 months of interest at the loan rate. Check your loan contract for exact terms.

tauxFixeVsVariable.pageDesc: Simulate and compare a fixed-rate and variable-rate mortgage over the full loan term. Three evolution scenarios let you visualize risk and potential gain based on market conditions.
tauxFixeVsVariable.fixedBetter: ✓ Fixed rate is more advantageous in this scenario
tauxFixeVsVariable.variableBetter: ✓ Variable rate is more advantageous in this scenario
tauxFixeVsVariable.disclaimer: Result based on simulation. Actual rates may vary according to your profile and economic context.

ratesTable.note: * For {amount} borrowed, excl. insurance. Source: {source}. Indicative rates (built-in reference, no API).

guides.metaDescription: All our free guides on French mortgage lending — updated with the latest 2026 news.
guides.subtitle: Everything about mortgage lending in France — written by experts, updated with the latest news and optimized for your project.
guides.ctaTitle: Put it into practice with our simulators
guides.ctaDesc: Our free tools calculate your monthly payment, borrowing capacity or notary fees in seconds — no sign-up.

ville.dataNote: * Rates and min/max ranges are indicative (built-in reference, no API). Excl. insurance. Price per m² (detail): medians from official French government data (DVF 2025) when the commune has enough published sales.
ville.priceNote: Average price based on {price} €/m²; per m² detail uses official French government data (DVF 2025) when the commune is covered, otherwise an estimate aligned with 2025 public references.
ville.brokersDesc: {n} mortgage brokers operate in {city} and its region. A broker can help you access negotiated deals from many banks and support you in building your application.
ville.brokersNetworks: Major networks present: Meilleurtaux, Pretto, Vousfinancer, Cafpi, Empruntis, as well as independent brokers.
ville.faqTitle: Frequently asked questions about real estate in {city}
ville.consultRates: View average mortgage rates in {city} and simulate your loan using official French government data (2025) and the site’s reference rates. Average rate over 20 years:
ville.metaTitle: Mortgage rates in {city} in 2026 — Loan simulator
ville.metaDescStatic: Average mortgage rates in {city} in 2026: {taux}% over 20 years. Price per m² {prix} €. Simulate your mortgage in {city}.
ville.metaDescDynamic: Estimated mortgage rates in {city} in 2026: {taux}% over 20 years. Price per m² {prix} €. Simulate your mortgage in {city}.
ville.faqRateQ: What is the mortgage rate in {city} in 2026?
ville.faqRateA: In {city}, the average 20-year rate in 2026 is approximately {taux}%.
ville.faqPriceQ: What is the price per m² in {city}?
ville.faqPriceAStatic: The average price per m² in {city} is about {prix} € in 2026.
ville.faqPriceADynamicSuffix: (estimate from official French government data — departmental reference for {dept}, 2025 vintage).
ville.faqBorrowQ: How much to borrow to buy in {city}?
ville.faqBorrowA: For a 50 m² property in {city} (~{total50} €), you need ~{borrow} € with 10% down.
ville.dynamicBadgeText: — {city} ({cp}) · Dept. {dept} · PTZ zone {ptz}. Price per m² is based on official French government data (departmental reference, 2025); rates are derived from the site’s national reference data.
ville.intro: View mortgage rates in {city} in 2026. Average rate over 20 years:
ville.jsonLdDesc: Mortgage rates and loan simulator for {city}
ville.ptzDynamicBodyC: As a commune classified in zone {zone}, {city} qualifies for the zero-interest loan for older properties with works (≥ 25% of total cost) and for all new-build properties.
ville.ptzDynamicBodyOther: As a commune classified in zone {zone}, {city} qualifies for the zero-interest loan for new and older properties with works across all zones.
ville.propertyEstimationSuffix: · Estimate from official French government data (departmental reference, 2025)

tauxImmobilier.metaTitle: Mortgage rates by city in 2026 — Find your commune
tauxImmobilier.metaDescription: View mortgage rates and price per m² for your city in 2026. Search all French communes and simulate your mortgage in a few clicks.
tauxImmobilier.intro: Search any French commune: mortgage rates, price per m², PTZ zone and a personalised loan simulator.
tauxImmobilier.searchTitle: Which city are you looking for?
tauxImmobilier.searchHint: By city name or postcode — Grenoble, 38000, Annecy, 74000…
tauxImmobilier.searchFootnote: Geographic reference: api.gouv.fr · Prices: official French government data (DVF 2025), presented on the site when the commune is covered
tauxImmobilier.ptzDesc: Your commune’s PTZ zone determines the maximum zero-interest loan you may qualify for. It reflects housing market pressure under the public zoning rules.
tauxImmobilier.howRatesBody: Rates shown are indicative reference values built into the site (no external API). City pages apply an adjustment based on the commune profile.
tauxImmobilier.wherePricesTitle: Where do price per m² figures come from?
tauxImmobilier.wherePricesBody: Detailed medians come from official French government data (DVF 2025), presented on the site when your commune is covered. Otherwise an estimate aligned with 2025 public references (departmental level) is used.

villePrix.ancienFromDvf: Official French government data (DVF 2025) — all postcodes in the commune
villePrix.footerCityPrices: Source: official French government data — DVF 2025 (recorded sales), presented on the site.
villePrix.footerNotInFile: Source: estimate from 2025 public references (departmental level) — commune-level DVF detail not available due to insufficient published volume.
villePrix.footerNeufDvf: New build: 2025 DVF where available, else coefficient ({zone}).
villePrix.title: Price per m² in {city}
villePrix.subtitle: Flats & houses · Resale & new
villePrix.noDvfDetailBanner: Official French government data (DVF 2025) does not yet support reliable per-property-type medians for this commune (insufficient published volume). The €/m² figures below are estimates aligned with 2025 public references and PTZ-zone coefficients.
